---
title: "E. Controls + Testing"
subtitle: "Validation suites, test frameworks, continuous monitoring, DR testing"
doc-type: subcategory-landing
pillar: compliance
sub-category: E
status: scaffold
date: 2026-04-24
aspirational: true
---

# E. Controls + Testing {.unnumbered}

Controls are worthless without tests. This sub-category documents the
test framework, decision trees, mock-tenant harness, and continuous
monitoring loops that prove controls hold. Validation suites are paired
1:1 with adapter specs.

## Leaves

- **E.1** Validation Suites — [validation-suites/](../../validation-suites/index.qmd)
- **E.2** Governance Enforcement Test Suite (MOD_J)
- **E.3** Enforcement Decision Trees (MOD_K)
- **E.4** Mock Tenant Test Harness (MOD_O)
- **E.5** Pester test framework
- **E.6** Continuous monitoring
- **E.7** DR testing
